title: haplophyllum hispanicum var. pubescens
intro: Haplophyllum hispanicum var. pubescens, also known as the Iberian dodonaea, is a shrub species native to the Iberian Peninsula. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, compounds that contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain. In herbal preparations, Haplophyllum hispanicum var. pubescens is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
